name: Bay Seafood Seasoning Blend
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Store the mixture in an airtight container.
3. Use this seasoning blend with seafood or chicken dishes.
4. Yield: 1/4 cup.
5. Keep herb containers in a dark, cool, dry place for up to six months.
6. Avoid storing seasonings on open racks above or near cook tops or ovens, as heat can weaken spice flavors.
7. For long-term storage, consider freezing seldom-used seasonings to maintain freshness.
